commit.message: * suggestion from walulyai: make G1VerifyBitmaps a diagnostic flag, remove previous change
* only add G1VerifyBitmaps in debug builds because it is a develop option

8382635

Hi all,

  please review this small fix that fixes a crash during bitmap verification. If there is no concurrent start gc, but another young gc before a full gc, `G1ConcurrentMark::fully_initialize()` overwrites TAMSes previously set by `G1HeapRegion::initialize/hr_clear()` to null.

Bitmap verification (enabled by `-XX:+VerifyBitmaps`) then tries to start verification from address 0x0, causing either verification failures or crashes.

Testing: amended test case now succeeds, gha

Thanks,
  Thomas
